Venue Info
Media Gallery
Xfinity Center
Mansfield, MA
Previous Names:
Great Woods Performing Arts Center (Changed after 1997)
Tweeter Center for the Performing Arts (Changed after 2008)
Comcast Center (Changed after 2013)
Seating Capacity: 19900
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 31
  DMB  (30)
  Dave & Tim  (1)

Longest Performance:
08.02.07 - Bartender (20:06)

Song Liberations
  7.9.05 – #34 (after 4491 days)
  6.15.13 – True Reflections (after 3609 days)
Venue Picture
Description
The Comcast Center in Mansfield, MA consists of 7,000 reserved seats and 12,900 in the lawn.

885 S. Main St.
Mansfield, MA 02048

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
#27 (full band) (8.1.07)
Black Water (8.2.07)
